response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify any vocal music tracks. The audio throughout the video is a consistent instrumental background track with no vocals present. Therefore, no song metadata or lyrics were identified or searched. The scenes were mapped based on the visual transitions between the informational and fan-message content.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the Hololive English 3rd Concert 'ALL FOR ONE', featuring informational slides on venue guidelines, merchandise, and a compilation of fan-submitted messages, accompanied by instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Introductory slide featuring Ollie and promotional information.
Promotional poster for the Hololive English 3rd Concert 'ALL FOR ONE'.
Informational slide regarding event guidelines and 'Attention' for visitors.
Slide displaying available concert merchandise, including light sticks and t-shirts.
Sequence of multiple slides displaying fan-submitted messages and artwork for the concert.
Static wide shot of the concert venue, Radio City Music Hall.
